response:
<case app="GenCase" date="2023-10-05">
  <casedef>
    <constantsdef>
      <lattice bound="1" fluid="1" />
      <gravity x="0" y="0" z="-9.81" />
    </constantsdef>
    <geometry>
      <definition dp="0.01" units_comment="metres">
        <pointmin x="-1" y="-1" z="-1" />
        <pointmax x="2" y="2" z="2" />
      </definition>
      <commands>
        <mainlist>
          <setshapemode>actual | dp | bound</setshapemode>
          <setdrawmode mode="full" />
          <setmkbound mk="0" />
          <drawstl>
            <file>cases/fuel_tank.stl</file>
            <scale>1</scale>
            <point x="0" y="0" z="0" />
          </drawstl>
          <setmkfluid mk="0" />
          <drawbox>
            <boxfill>solid</boxfill>
            <point x="0" y="0" z="0" />
            <size x="1" y="0.5" z="0.3" />
          </drawbox>
        </mainlist>
      </commands>
    </geometry>
    <motion>
      <objreal ref="0">
        <begin mov="1" start="0" />
        <mvrectsinu id="1" duration="10" next="0">
          <freq x="0.5" y="0" z="0" />
          <ampl x="0.05" y="0" z="0" />
        </mvrectsinu>
      </objreal>
    </motion>
  </casedef>
  <execution>
    <parameters>
      <parameter key="SavePosDouble" value="0" />
      <parameter key="Boundary" value="2" />
      <parameter key="StepAlgorithm" value="2" />
      <parameter key="VerletSteps" value="40" />
      <parameter key="Kernel" value="2" />
      <parameter key="ViscoTreatment" value="1" />
      <parameter key="Visco" value="0.01" />
      <parameter key="DensityDT" value="2" />
      <parameter key="Shifting" value="0" />
      <parameter key="RigidAlgorithm" value="1" />
      <parameter key="FtPause" value="0" />
      <parameter key="CoefDtMin" value="0.05" />
      <parameter key="PartsOutMax" value="1" />
      <parameter key="RhopOutMin" value="700" />
      <parameter key="RhopOutMax" value="1300" />
      <parameter key="TimeMax" value="10" />
      <parameter key="TimeOut" value="0.02" />
    </parameters>
  </execution>
</case>
